_doc: State file written by the Fireflies → PPL Dash auto-ingest scheduled task. Tracks which transcripts have been processed so re-runs are idempotent. Do not edit by hand unless you know what you're doing.
lastRunMessage: Ingested GL5 (Fireflies id 01KQXBR03YYE6NRPPFGDRHERG1, 'Ground lesson 5 May 05, 05:41 PM', 108 min, 2026-05-05). Title was renamed by Aryan since the previous run (was 'May 05, 05:41 PM' default; matched our action note in the prior lastRunMessage). Topics: stall fundamentals (critical AoA), pre-maneuver/cruise checklist, pitch-power-trim, mixture leaning above 3000 MSL (G1000 vs N51840 method), carb-heat use cases, verbatim power-on stall procedure (1500 RPM, 55 kt, 65% power, 20-25° pitch, 3 call-outs), verbatim power-off stall procedure (carb heat out, 1800 RPM, flaps 10/20/30 below 110/85/85, 65 kt descent, 8-15 sec, power idle, 10-15° pitch flare, 4 call-outs with buffeting), ACS tolerances (1500 ft AGL ASEL recovery, ±10° heading, max 20° bank, ≥65% power-on), PARE spin recovery (Power idle, Ailerons neutral, Rudder opposite, Elevator forward), spin entry conditions (stalled + uncoordinated), 4 spin phases (entry/incipient/developed/recovery), steep vs flat spin with CG, KSNA base-to-final 'deadly turn' (550-650 ft AGL, down-aileron-stalls-first aerodynamics), IMC + spin (trust instruments), visual reference points, clearing turns (90L+90R), Operation Lights On AC. Generated: 1 lesson seed (~21 homework items), 1 sparknotes chapter chip + article (~12 H2 sections, 12 flashcards), 1 quiz (12 multiple-choice questions). SW cache bumped v18→v19. Window scanned: 14 days from 2026-04-23, 25 transcripts retrieved; remaining transcripts are SkyAccess work meetings (JetNet/Aerodex 3-yr deal, FetchAir, AMSTAT, Flightworks, AirAlsie, OKR/negotiation training, etc.) — non-matching.
